text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's odd... Is there no one here?

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
I'm pretty sure somebody called my name,
though. Are the fairies playing pranks? Or
perhaps...

text_block_list.name: Fine Motion
text_block_list.text:
O Three Goddesses... Was it you who summoned
me by any chance?
